episodes.title: Museum Opening UTOPIA Three Centuries of Sexuality in Cults & Communes Part 5 of 6
episodes.description:
Early video works by legendary multimedia artists Dean and Dudley Evenson are featured in the groundbreaking exhibition, Utopia: Three Centuries of Sexuality in Cults and Communes. Join Dudley Evenson on opening night at Manhattan’s popular Museum of Sex for a glimpse of the show.

Curated by Jodi Wille, Utopia explores the rich tapestry of alternative spiritual communities in America and their enduring influence on culture, intimacy, and creativity. The exhibition runs at Museum of Sex in Manhattan October 11, 2025 – April 12, 2026. It then moves to Museum of Sex in Miami for six months opening May 2026.

The Evensons’ portion highlights ten evocative videos capturing spiritual exploration, communal living, and creative collaboration. Among them is Dudley Evenson’s landmark natural childbirth video, filmed in the nude in her bus home on a Florida island—a bold, intimate perspective on birth outside conventional medical settings, embodying the spirit of innovation and self-determination.

Dean and Dudley Evenson are pioneers in video art, music, and cultural documentation. From joining New York’s Raindance early video group to co-editing Radical Software and traveling the country in a converted school bus documenting communal living, the Evensons have uniquely chronicled America’s countercultural movements. Their work led to the founding of Soundings of the Planet, a multimedia platform promoting peace, environmental awareness, and personal transformation.
Curator Jodi Wille emphasizes:"Dean and Dudley Evenson’s videos capture the raw authenticity, creativity, and courage of those who dared to seek utopia in America. Their work invites us to reflect on the lasting legacies of these communities."

Utopia is more than an exhibition—it’s a journey into how video, music, and lived experience intersected to redefine freedom, creativity, and connection in this compelling visual history. Experience a rare glimpse into the alternative communities that shaped American culture—in part through the visionary lens of Dean and Dudley Evenson.

This video was produced by Daniel Harm who created a complex system to allow Dean Evenson and family members to experience the opening live from their home in the Pacific Northwest. He was assisted by Cybele Olsen, Dean and Dudley’s granddaughter.

Learn more about Dean & Dudley and all Soundings artists at http://www.soundings.com

Check out Dean Evenson's latest album Sacred Canyons - inspired by the life-long dedication to the power & wonder of musical healing.
Sacred Canyons: https://listen.soundings.com/sacredcanyons

Stream all Dean Evenson Music here:
https://open.spotify.com/artist/6Sp2FifnF2ZMmUrLvUuapi?si=4LFIm3IUR36SBmLWGco87Q

Stream all Dudley Evenson Music here:
https://open.spotify.com/artist/6kDyIwI2psirzHCWyHKDTV?si=lSGSvmrnS46SvHbqKpvjrg

You can pick up your copy of Dudley & Dean Evenson's book "Quieting the Monkey Mind" here: https://www.amazon.com/Quieting-Monkey-Mind-Meditate-Music/dp/0999137905/ref=sr_1_1?crid=1CN0B44OZ8RKI&keywords=quieting+the+monkey+mind&qid=1692816367&s=books&sprefix=quieting+the+mo%2Cstripbooks%2C187&sr=1-1

You can pick up your copy of Dudley & Dean Evenson's book "A Year of Guided Meditations" here:
https://www.amazon.com/Year-Guided-Meditations-Weekly-Affirmations/dp/0999137921

Dean & Dudley Evenson and our whole Soundings team send blessings of peace to you and all your family and all the people in your world.

---------------------------

Thank you for subscribing to Dean & Dudley Living Dreams:

episodes.title: Museum Opening UTOPIA Three Centuries of Sexuality in Cults & Communes (Part 1 of 6)

Early video works by legendary multimedia artists Dean and Dudley Evenson are featured in the groundbreaking exhibition, Utopia: Three Centuries of Sexuality in Cults and Communes. Join Dudley Evenson on opening night at Manhattan’s popular Museum of Sex for a glimpse of the show.

Curated by Jodi Wille, Utopia explores the rich tapestry of alternative spiritual communities in America and their enduring influence on culture, intimacy, and creativity. The exhibition runs at Museum of Sex in Manhattan October 11, 2025 – April 12, 2026. It then moves to Museum of Sex in Miami for six months opening May 2026.

The Evensons’ portion highlights ten evocative videos capturing spiritual exploration, communal living, and creative collaboration. Among them is Dudley Evenson’s landmark natural childbirth video, filmed in the nude in her bus home on a Florida island—a bold, intimate perspective on birth outside conventional medical settings, embodying the spirit of innovation and self-determination.

Dean and Dudley Evenson are pioneers in video art, music, and cultural documentation. Curator Jodi Wille emphasizes:"Dean and Dudley Evenson’s videos capture the raw authenticity, creativity, and courage of those who dared to seek utopia in America. Their work invites us to reflect on the lasting legacies of these communities."
